ddls:
CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Head of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "faculty" TEXT /* Faculty the department belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lecturers" (
  "lecturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lecturer */,
  "lecturer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the lecturer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lecturer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the lecturer belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the lecturer (e.g., Professor, Lecturer, Tutor) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the lecturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lecturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lecturers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "enrolment_status" TEXT /* Enrolment status of the student */,
  "program" TEXT /* Program the student is enrolled in */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus the student is based at */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrolments" (
  "enrolment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrolment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student enrolling in the course unit */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course unit being enrolled in */,
  "enrolment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course unit */,
  "mode_of_study" TEXT /* Mode of study (e.g., Full-time, Part-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrolment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrolments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teaching_blocks" (
  "teaching_block_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teaching block */,
  "teaching_block_name" TEXT /* Name of the teaching block */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the teaching block */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the teaching block */,
  "campus" TEXT /* Campus where the teaching block is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teaching_block_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_unit_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course unit being assigned */,
  "lecturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lecturer being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the lecturer was assigned to the course unit */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the lecturer (e.g., Coordinator, Tutor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_unit_assignments_lecturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lecturer_id") REFERENCES lecturers ("lecturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "Course_unit_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "enrolment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrolment being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Status of the progress (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided to the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_Course_unit_progress_enrolment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrolment_id") REFERENCES enrolments ("enrolment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assessment */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course unit being assessed */,
  "assessment_name" TEXT /* Name of the assessment */,
  "weightage" REAL /* Weightage of the assessment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assessment */,
  "submission_type" TEXT /* Type of submission (e.g., Online, In-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "enrolment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrolment being graded */,
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assessment being graded */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade achieved by the student */,
  "grade_date" TEXT /* Date the grade was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_enrolment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrolment_id") REFERENCES enrolments ("enrolment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grades_assessment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessment_id") REFERENCES assessments ("assessment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
